temporal_description: A close-up shot focuses on a man with a distressed expression, his eyes wide and his mouth slightly agape. He holds a lit cigarette to his lips, and a thin wisp of smoke curls upwards. He is wearing a dark suit jacket. In the foreground, the out-of-focus shoulder and hand of another person are visible, suggesting a tense confrontation. The background is dark and indistinct. In the top left corner, the Chinese characters "风行网" are displayed in a white, stylized font. The camera is tight on the man's face, emphasizing his emotional state. A man shouts in a loud, urgent, and agitated voice, "快点走啊!" (Hurry up and go!). His tone is filled with panic and impatience, as if he's in a dangerous or stressful situation and is trying to force someone to leave immediately. The scene cuts to a different man, also in a close-up. He wears glasses and a suit with a tie. He brings a cigarette to his lips and takes a drag, looking down and to the side with a calm, focused demeanor. The background remains dark and blurry. The "风行网" text is still visible in the top left corner. The camera is steady, capturing his action of smoking. The shot changes to a close-up of a hand holding an old, silver flip phone. The hand presses a button on the keypad. The background is dark and out of focus, with a bright, vertical light source creating a slight glare on the phone. The "风行网" text remains in the top left corner. The camera is static, focusing entirely on the hand and the phone. The video cuts back to the man with glasses. He continues to smoke, looking down and away from the camera. The shot is a steady close-up, maintaining the same framing and focus as before. The "风行网" text is still present in the top left corner. The audio is dominated by his voice, with no background music or other significant sound effects, making his frantic command the central focus.
